description: B600N and B600S are parallel intakes (north/south spine) not series. naming_index_chain wrongly inferred parent-child. Removed via topology_overrides.
Patched from 9 children's readings (sum aggregation). Counter froze Jan 17 then reset to 0 on Feb 2.
Counter degrading: intermittent reads then 3-day flat then backlog flush (234 MWh in one day). Transition period before full offline.
Counter flat for 6 days — summer shutdown. Self-recovering.
Single-day flat reading (delta=0). Next day shows 200 MWh (two days accumulated).
Device replacement. Old counter ended at 19693. New device started at 1934. Stitched via rolling_sum derived ref.
Counter reset to 0.001 and stayed dead. Patched from child B642.VMM71.
Counter dropped from 25231 to 10890 for 3 days then reverted. Temporary register glitch. Readings excluded via validity split.
B642.VMM72 flow exceeds parent B614.VMM71 by 2-7x during Jan and Apr-Jun. PDF confirms downstream. Suspected undocumented additional steam feed. Needs on-site investigation.
Counter frozen since Mar 12. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Counter at 0 for entire observation window. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Counter at 0 for entire observation window. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Multiple frozen periods (Jun 20 / Jun 30 / Jul 12). Intermittent meter — reads some weeks then goes flat.
Counter frozen from Feb 19 onwards. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
B600N north spine has 60% unmetered flow. Only 40% of intake captured by downstream meters (B616/B643/B833/B921). Missing meters or undocumented consumers.
31% of total site steam intake not accounted for by downstream meters. South spine 14% (acceptable). North spine 60% (missing meters).
Device swap. Counter reset from 9993343. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9998247. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9995611. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap at start of observation window. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9996529. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9994919. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9996928. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Snowflake ID = B621.B621-T5-S (doubled building prefix). Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Snowflake ID = B621.B621-T6-S (doubled building prefix). Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9999278. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9999965. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9996346. Stitched via rolling_sum.
Device swap. Counter reset from 9995369. Stitched via rolling_sum.

Provider/utility meter with 7 counter resets (~bimonthly read cycle). All segments stitched via rolling_sum. Boundary artifacts visible in daily chart on reset days — consumption on those days is partially lost.
Provider/utility meter with 3 counter resets (~quarterly). All segments stitched via rolling_sum.
Counter drops and stays dead from Feb 12. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Counter at zero for entire observation window. Sub-feeder of B616.T33 serving B835.
B665.T42-2-1 reads ~5 MWh/month in Snowflake but Excel STRUX_data shows 0. B664 shows excel=0 vs topology=4.9 MWh. B665 overcredited by ~5 MWh/month. Stale STRUX_data.
B612 formula double-subtracts T8-A3-A14-112 (~19 MWh/month). B612 understated by ~3% vs physical reality.
Sub-feeder subtracted from B659 but not attributed to any building. ~8 MWh/month unaccounted.

Enhetsbyte: B616.KB1_PKYL slutade rapportera 2025-06-13 (143 MWh för delvis jun). Ny mätare B616.KB1_VMM50_E startade 2025-07-15 (441 MWh delvis jul). Cirka 1 månads dataglapp. Stitchade via rolling_sum.

Mätare B638.KB1_INT_VERK1 rapporterar 0 under hela observationsperioden (jan 2025 – feb 2026). Fysisk submätare till B612.KB1_PKYL. Troligen avställd eller trasig sedan minst dec 2024. Inga barn att patcha från.

Mätare B642.KB1_INT_VERK_1 rapporterar 0 under hela observationsperioden. Fysisk submätare till B614.KB1_INT_VERK (som läser 20–302 MWh/mån). Meter_swaps klassade offline 2025-09-12 men mätaren var redan död. Inga barn att patcha från.
Mätare B643.KB1_INT_VERK rapporterar 0 under hela observationsperioden. Ensam byggnadsmätare för B643 kyla. Byggnaden har separat FV1_INT_VERK (fjärrvärme) som är aktiv, men kylan är tom.

Produktionsmätare B653.KB2_WVÄRME_ACK slutade rapportera 2025-10-09. Sista hela månaden var sept 2025 (718 MWh). Mätaren ingår i B600-KB2 och Prod-600 formler. Offline gör att byggnader som beror på B600-KB2 (B611, B613, B621, B622) inte kan beräknas fr.o.m. okt 2025.
B654.KB2_Pkyl_Ack rapporterar 0 i jan 2025 och upphör helt efter 10 feb. Ingår i B600-KB2 och Prod-600 men bidrar med 0 MWh. Troligen avkommissionerad eller aldrig kopplad.

B661.KB1_Pkyl_Ack hade 59 counterresets under jan 2025 med 0 MWh nettodelta. Troligen igångkörning/kalibrering. Data exkluderat (valid_from=2025-02-01). Från feb 2025 normala ackumulerade värden (2720–4589 MWh/mån).

B661.KB1_Pkyl_Ack läser ~4500 MWh/mån (6.2 MW snitt). Jämförelse: B653.KB2_WVÄRME_ACK (huvudproduktionsmätare KB2) max 1210 MWh/mån. Summas utan koefficient i Prod-600. Enhet möjligen kWh i stället för MWh, eller mätaren mäter total kyleffekt (kompressor + kyla). Kräver driftsbekräftelse.

Excel rapporterar B658 kyla = 0 MWh men Snowflake läser 10–42 MWh/mån (säsongsvariation, peak sommar). Känt mönster 'Excel=0 but meter live' dokumenterat i RESOLVE_ONTOLOGY §10. STRUX_data-tabellen har inaktuella/nollvärden.

B612.KB1_PKYL rapporterar sporadiskt: jan=197, apr=201, jun=473, sep=2049 MWh; övriga månader = 0. Registrerad som både Automatisk och Manuell i STRUX. Beteende tyder på kvartalsvis manuell avläsning — per-dag deltan alltid 0 men månadsregisterskillnad nonzero. Sep-spiket (2049 MWh) kan vara ackumulerad missad avläsning.

B833.KB1_GF4 rapporterar identiskt sporadiskt mönster som B612.KB1_PKYL: jan=141, apr=292, jun=143, sep=986 MWh; övriga = 0. Kvartalsvis avläsning. Sep-spiket (986 MWh) troligen ackumulerad. Konservering mot B834 (0.8–10 MWh/mån) kan bara kontrolleras 4 månader.
Counterreset 2025-01-08 detekterad av meter_swaps. Två segment stitchade via rolling_sum (A: →2025-01-08, B: 2025-01-08→). Mätaren rapporterar intermittent: 0–62 MWh/mån.
Counterreset 2025-03-04. Två segment stitchade via rolling_sum. Mars 2025 låg delta (2.5 MWh vs normalt 25–98 MWh) troligen pga reset mitt i månaden.
